work_wit.as_written: جزواً من مواعظ ابنيا القدس ثاودورس رىيس دير الاسطودیون, f. 8v

excerpt.as_written: يا اخوتي واباي لما أهلنا بنعمة السيد المسيح
translation: Oh my brothers and father, wherefore by the aid of Lord Christ…

excerpt.as_written: بنعمة ربنا اليسوع المسيح وتحننه الذي له المجد والقدره مع الآب والروح القدس الآن ودائما والي دهر الدهور امين
translation: [...] by the grace and mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ to Whom be the glory and the power with the Father and the Holy Spirit now, always, and forever. Amen

work.desc_title: Treatises of Mar Ephrem the Syrian
creator: ark:/21198/s1v887

work_wit.as_written: اقوال لابينا القديس مار افرام السرياني, f. 6r (fihrist)

excerpt.as_written: اول خراب نفس الراهب هو الضحك والباريسيا
translation: The first ruin of the soul of a monk is laughter and parrēsia (παρρησία)…

excerpt.as_written: وبتواضع العقل ارتفع شان العشار الذّي معه يوهلنا الرّب الحظ الذي لا يبلي مع كافة الصديقين فان به يليق المجد الى أباد الدهور امين
translation: [...] and with humility of mind, the character of the publican is exalted with whom the Lord grants us his fate with all the saints, for the glory is worthy of him to the end of the ages. Amen

contents.label: Mimar of St. Ephrem that a monk ought not laugh or rejoice, bur rather weep and mourn for himself always, f. 173r
Another by the same on love, repentance, and worldliness, f. 177r
Another by the same on virginity, f. 180r
Another by the same, a sermon on how one should not leave a place before putting on the holy habit, f. 187v
Another by the same concerning the differences of lethargy, f. 190r
Another by the same, treatise on the destruction of pride, f. 192v

excerpt.as_written: قد واتانا يومً شريف من السنه يوم عید مجاهد الدنيا
translation: Today, we have come to a noble time of the year. Today is the feast of the one fraught with struggle in the world…

excerpt.as_written: التي لا يباح بوصفها التي نتمنا كلنا ان نوّهل لها بنعمة ربنا يسوع المسيح وجوده الذي له المجد والعز مع الاب والروح القدس الآن ودائما والي اباد الدهور امين
translation: [...] which cannot be discovered in its properties, but which all of us hope to be suited for, by the grace and goodness of our Lord Jesus Christ, to whom be the glory and the power with the Father and the Holy Spirit, now, always, and forever and ever. Amen

work.desc_title: Chrysostom on being late to prayer
creator: ark:/21198/s1x303

excerpt.as_written: كما انه ولا صنف من اصناف المنفعه يحصل الذين يزرعون أرضهم
translation: As much as there is not any kind of benefit achieved for those who cultivate their land…

excerpt.as_written: ونعمل العمل الصالح بحسب طاقتنا لنستمتع بالحياة الحاضرة وننال الخيرات المستانفة بنعمة ربنا ومخلصنا ايسوع المسيح ومحبته للبشر الذي له المجد والعز والوقار مع ابيه الازلي وروحه الصالح المحيى الكلي قدسه الآن و دايما والی آباد الدهور امين
translation: [...] and we do righteous deeds according to our capability, to enjoy the present life and to obtain the good for which we have appealed by the grace of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ and his love for humanity, to whom be the glory, honor, and dignity with his eternal Father and the righteous and life-giving-for-all  Holy Spirit, now, always, and forever. Amen

excerpt.as_written: سنة 𐋣𐋮𐋳□ كيكلس الشمس 𐋣𐋪 كيكاس القمر 𐋩 قاعدة الهلال 𐋢𐋪
translation: The year 7153: Cycle of the sun - 13, cycle of the moon - 9, pattern of the new moon - 12

excerpt.as_written: احد جميع القديسين 𐋡𐋪 حزيران . صوم الرسل 𐋧𐋪 وعيدهم الخميس
translation: Sunday of All Saints - 11 Haziran, Fast of the Apostles - 17 and their feast, Thursday

note: The calendar is divided into subsections by years, beginning in the year 7153 AM (1644 AD) to 7201 AM (1693 AD)
